name: jsonresume-theme-minimal-clean
description: Tema minimalista y limpio para JSON Resume

scripts.html:cli:elegant:es: npx --package resume-cli resume export resume_es_elegant.html -r resume_es.json -t jsonresume-theme-elegant
scripts.html:cli:elegant:en: npx --package resume-cli resume export resume_en_elegant.html -r resume_en.json -t jsonresume-theme-elegant
scripts.html:cli:professional:es: npx --package resume-cli resume export resume_es_professional.html -r resume_es.json -t @jsonresume/jsonresume-theme-professional
scripts.html:cli:professional:en: npx --package resume-cli resume export resume_en_professional.html -r resume_en.json -t @jsonresume/jsonresume-theme-professional
scripts.html:cli:professional:es:bundled: npm run build:theme:professional && npx --package resume-cli resume export resume_es_professional.html -r resume_es.json -t ./build/jsonresume-theme-professional/index.cjs
scripts.html:cli:professional:en:bundled: npm run build:theme:professional && npx --package resume-cli resume export resume_en_professional.html -r resume_en.json -t ./build/jsonresume-theme-professional/index.cjs

author: Oscar David Valencia Alvarez
